steps.title: Identify the subject's number
steps.content: The subject is “Coaches in the IWBF”—the noun “Coaches” is plural, and the prepositional phrase “in the IWBF” modifies it but doesn't change the subject's number.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Subject-verb agreement requires a plural subject to take a plural verb form. “use” (C) is the plural verb form needed here. The other options all use singular verb forms (“is using,” “has used,” “uses”), violating subject-verb agreement. That matches choice C — C is correct.
